2604.19572.title: A Self-Evolving Framework for Efficient Terminal Agents via Observational Context Compression
2604.19572.paper_summary: As model capabilities advance, research has increasingly shifted toward long-horizon, multi-turn terminal-centric agentic tasks, where raw environment feedback is often preserved in the interaction history to support future decisions. However, repeatedly retaining such feedback introduces substantial redundancy and causes cumulative token cost to grow quadratically with the number of steps, hindering long-horizon reasoning. Although observation compression can mitigate this issue, the heterogeneity of terminal environments makes heuristic-based or fixed-prompt methods difficult to generalize. We propose TACO, a plug-and-play, self-evolving Terminal Agent Compression framework that automatically discovers and refines compression rules from interaction trajectories for existing terminal agents. Experiments on TerminalBench (TB 1.0 and TB 2.0) and four additional terminal-related benchmarks (i.e., SWE-Bench Lite, CompileBench, DevEval, and CRUST-Bench) show that TACO consistently improves performance across mainstream agent frameworks and strong backbone models. With MiniMax-2.5, it improves performance on most benchmarks while reducing token overhead by around 10%. On TerminalBench, it brings consistent gains of 1%-4% across strong agentic models, and further improves accuracy by around 2%-3% under the same token budget. These results demonstrate the effectiveness and generalization of self-evolving, task-aware compression for terminal agents.
2604.19572.paper_summary_zh: 隨著模型能力的進步，研究越來越多地轉向長期、多回合的以終端為中心的智能任務，在這些任務中，原始環境反饋通常會保留在互動歷史中，以支持未來的決策。<lb/>然而，重複保留這樣的反饋會引入大量冗餘，並使累積的標記成本隨著步驟數的增加而以平方的速度增長，從而妨礙長期推理。<lb/>儘管觀察壓縮可以緩解這一問題，但終端環境的異質性使得基於啟發式或固定提示的方法難以推廣。<lb/>我們提出了TACO，一個即插即用、自我演化的終端代理壓縮框架，能夠自動從現有終端代理的互動軌跡中發現和完善壓縮規則。<lb/>在TerminalBench（TB 1.0和TB 2.0）以及四個額外的終端相關基準（即SWE-Bench Lite、CompileBench、DevEval和CRUST-Bench）上的實驗顯示，TACO在主流代理框架和強大基礎模型中始終提高了性能。<lb/>使用MiniMax-2.5，它在大多數基準上提高了性能，同時將標記開銷減少了約10%。<lb/>在TerminalBench上，它在強力智能模型中帶來了1%-4%的穩定增益，並在相同的標記預算下進一步提高了約2%-3%的準確性。<lb/>這些結果證明了自我演化、任務感知壓縮對終端代理的有效性和泛化能力。
2604.19572.author: Jincheng Ren et.al.
2604.19572.authors: Jincheng Ren, Siwei Wu, Yizhi Li, Kang Zhu, Shu Xu, Boyu Feng, Ruibin Yuan, Wei Zhang, Riza Batista-Navarro, Jian Yang, Chenghua Lin
